title: FillTemplate
description: POST /api/FillTemplate — Replaces text placeholders in specific shapes of a PPTX template. Send as multipart/form-data with a 'template' file field (.pptx) and a 'placeholders' text field containing this JSON.

shapeReplacements.description: Key-value pairs where each key is a placeholder string found in the shape's text (e.g. '{{Title}}') and the value is the replacement text.
